description: Refine image-heavy webinar slides without changing the overall slide size. Focus on slide 6 alignment, slide 9 image height, slide 14 side-by-side comparison density, then re-review the rest of the deck for presentation-grade composition.

userStories.title: Align slide 6 text and image containers
userStories.description: As a webinar attendee, I want the Stitch update explanation and the supporting image block to start on the same horizontal line so the slide feels intentional and easy to scan.
acceptanceCriteria: Slide 6 uses a true left/right layout
The top of the Gemini 3 card aligns with the top of the right image block
Browser verification confirms slide 6 image sizes render within the slide

userStories.title: Tighten slide 9 and slide 14 media layouts
userStories.description: As a webinar attendee, I want slide 9 and slide 14 to feel compact and readable so that the PRD explanation and PRD power comparison look presentation-ready rather than oversized.
acceptanceCriteria: Slide 9 image container height is reduced without shrinking the whole slide
Slide 14 uses a compact left text area and right vertical image stack
Browser verification confirms the final image sizes fit inside each slide

userStories.title: Re-review all image-heavy slides
userStories.description: As a webinar attendee, I want all image-heavy slides to feel balanced and fully visible so that no slide looks cropped, crowded, or awkward on the projected screen.
acceptanceCriteria: All 25 slides report no overflow in browser review except known acceptable 1px cases, which should be eliminated if possible
Local and deployed webinar HTML stay in sync
GitHub Pages deploy succeeds after push
